Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10062 0 0}Dude, I just got the greatest plan from that manga I was reading![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm totally gonna get Ms. Kanou this way. Ya wanna hear it? Huh? Do ya? Ya know ya do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Okay, so this is what I'm gonna say to her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 10 25 25}"Hey, Ms. Kanou... I'm having a really hard time with this problem..."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}"Oh, don't worry, Tomochika-kun. I'm here to help you. Just you leave everything to me..."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10091 0 0}Man, why do you gotta be such a downer? It totally worked in the manga...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10075 0 0}{f 5 13 2 30 101}Whoa, serious!? Man, you're a good guy to have around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10095 0 0}Alright, let's continue our research so that I get my happily ever after![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm counting on you, dude. If you come up with something good, I'll buy you dinner or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Tomochika[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
